name: WellSaid Labs API
what_it_does: WellSaid Labs REST API — enterprise-grade AI text-to-speech with studio-quality human-sounding voices for corporate training, e-learning, and professional narration, enabling agents to generate high-quality audio content at scale.
use_cases: Agents generating professional narration audio for e-learning courses and corporate training content at scale
Marketing content — agents creating voiceover audio for product videos, ads, and explainer content
Documentation audio — agents converting technical documentation into audio formats for accessibility
Podcast production — agents generating high-quality podcast narration from scripts for automated content pipelines
Localization workflows — agents generating multilingual audio versions of content using WellSaid's voice portfolio
not_for: Real-time interactive voice — WellSaid is for pre-generated audio, not real-time speech synthesis; use ElevenLabs for real-time
Voice cloning from personal audio — WellSaid provides curated voices; use ElevenLabs for custom voice cloning
Budget-constrained use cases — WellSaid is enterprise-priced; use Google Cloud TTS or Amazon Polly for cost efficiency
best_when: You need enterprise-grade, studio-quality narration audio for e-learning or corporate content where voice quality and compliance (SOC2) are priorities.
avoid_when: You need custom voice cloning, real-time synthesis, or cost-efficient TTS — ElevenLabs, PlayHT, or cloud TTS APIs are better options.

auth.notes: API key from WellSaid Labs account. Passed as X-Api-Key header. Enterprise accounts may have team-level key management. No scope granularity — key has full account access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial with limited characters; no permanent free tier
pricing.paid_tiers: Creator: $50/month; Teams: $149/month; Enterprise: custom — pricing based on character volume
pricing.notes: Enterprise pricing focused on e-learning and corporate use. Character-based pricing model. Enterprise plans include SOC2 compliance, team management, and dedicated support.

performance.rate_limits: Concurrent synthesis requests limited by plan; character limits per request; async for long content

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with clear documentation. Synthesis is async for long content — polling required. Error responses include message and code. Voice ID lookup required before synthesis. Good documentation for enterprise integration.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: TTS synthesis of same text with same voice ID produces consistent audio. No session state — each request is independent. Async synthesis jobs return consistent audio for same inputs.
known_agent_gotchas: Voice IDs are WellSaid-specific — agents must pre-fetch available voice list to get valid voice IDs before synthesis
Character limits per request — split long documents into segments before synthesis; stitch audio server-side
Synthesis is asynchronous for long content — agents must poll synthesis job status for completion
Audio format options limited to WAV/MP3 — transcode if other formats required in downstream workflow
WellSaid voices are licensed for specific use cases — review license terms before using in commercial products

security_score_components.security_notes: SOC2 Type II. GDPR compliant. API key with no scope granularity. US data processing. Enterprise accounts include security reviews. HIPAA BAA available for healthcare narration use cases.
